div.p: Secretary of State Dulles and Harold E. Stassen, Director of the Mutual Security Administration, visited Western Europe between January 31 and February 8, 1953 for a series of conferences and discussions with various American and European officials on outstanding problems facing the Western alliance including the EDC. For documentation on the Dulles–Stassen trip to Europe in January and February 1953, see pages 1548 ff.
